data.description:

data.title: Oracle stock slide 5% as bondholders sue Larry El and his Wall Street lenders over AI debt
data.description:
Oracle shares fell 5% in afternoon trading on the New York Stock Exchange after bondholders filed a lawsuit against Larry Ellison, several senior executives, and a long list of underwriting banks over the company’s AI debt problem. The lawsuit landed on Wednesday in a New York state court in Manhattan. It was filed as a […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/oracle-stock-slide-5-as-bondholders-sue-larry-el-and-his-wall-street-lenders-over-ai-debt/

data.title: XRP Is Being Called a Done Deal After SEC Signals Shift – Here Is Why Markets Are Reacting
data.description:
"XRP is increasingly being referred to as a 'done deal' following recent indications from the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) that suggest a significant shift in their stance regarding cryptocurrencies. This development has prompted a notable reaction from the financial markets, as investors and analysts alike seek to understand the implications of the regulatory changes on the future of XRP and the overall cryptocurrency landscape. Here, we delve into the reasons behind this market reaction and explore the potential consequences of the SEC’s evolving position."
source: https://blocknews.com/xrp-is-being-called-a-done-deal-after-sec-signals-shift-here-is-why-markets-are-reacting/
